seo.title: About the Specialist — Acupuncture in Riga
seo.description: Meet our experienced acupuncture specialist with over 15 years of practice in traditional Chinese medicine in Riga, Latvia.

title: About the Specialist
summary: A certified acupuncture practitioner with over 15 years of experience in traditional Chinese medicine. Graduated from Beijing University of Chinese Medicine and holds multiple international certifications in acupuncture and TCM therapy.
credentials: Doctor of Traditional Chinese Medicine (Beijing UCM)
Member of the European Traditional Chinese Medicine Association
